anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: Current memory shows long CHoCH pockets underperform target WR and dilute A+ selectivity.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: Lowers WR toward 60% and increases average-trade noise.

anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: Forex long BOS/no-OB buckets were among the weakest sufficient-sample combinations.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: Cuts WR nearly to coin-flip and makes live performance unstable.

anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: FVG without displacement is often balance/noise rather than institutional repricing.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: Creates false precision and weak entries.

anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: Choppy conditions degrade time-and-price expansion setups.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: More stop-outs, fewer clean expansions, poor follow-through.

anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: Below-threshold setups lack enough confluence to match role models.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: Turns CB6 into average setup taker instead of best-self trader.

anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: Best broad NSE short continuation edge strengthens around higher confluence buckets.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: More marginal trades and lower stability.

anti_patterns.reason_to_avoid: Perfect WR at N<30 is not reliable enough for live filters.
Best robust target came from NSE 13:30; off-window trades need stronger proof.
anti_patterns.expected_damage: Lower selectivity and more session noise.
